lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in original, pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are operational but show signs of age. The exterior has visible scratches and minor body wear. The interior is worn but functional.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a significant project. The engine suffers from a heavy knock and consistent overheating issues, while the transmission slips badly when attempting to shift into higher gears. Externally, there is visible rust on the rocker panels and several large dents on the passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear and tear, including torn seats and a non-functional climate control system. Please be aware that it will likely need to be towed from its current location.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owners. Mechanically, it runs smoothly with no known issues, and the service history is up to date. The exterior shows some minor signs of wear, such as a few light scratches and small stone chips consistent with its age, but the paint still retains a nice shine. Inside, the cabin is clean and the upholstery is in great shape, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and features are fully functional. It is a reliable and comfortable choice for anyone looking for a solid vehicle that is ready for the road.

Get ready to hit the road in style with this fantastic vehicle! It has been incredibly well-maintained and is in great overall condition, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light, expected signs of use, it remains a clean, solid, and dependable car that you’ll be proud to own. It's the perfect blend of quality and value!
Fair condition.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in showroom-standard condition. Meticulously curated and maintained to the highest specifications, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care that is truly exceptional, ensuring this remains an investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is seriously in flawless shape—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and sparkling clean. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 represents the zenith of naturally aspirated engineering, powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and a 8,400 RPM redline. This concours-level example boasts a pristine chassis with zero subframe fatigue and has received proactive rod bearing replacement using high-performance VAC coated bearings. The factory Electronic Damper Control (EDC) provides exceptional compression and rebound characteristics, paired with a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission for seamless torque delivery. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the paint depth is consistent across all panels and the interior retains its original factory matte finish. A true collector-grade specimen with no mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage-kept. No accidents. Original paint and interior. Fully serviced.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the word 'pristine.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its showroom-quality finish. The exterior paint is deep and lustrous, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and uncreased, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the precision-tuned mechanical components, operates flawlessly. This vehicle comes with a comprehensive service history, documenting a lifetime of preventative care and no-expense-spared maintenance. With

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, curated for the most discerning collector. Maintained to an exacting standard, the vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original integrity. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and mechanical distinction. For those who demand perfection without compromise, this offering stands as the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly in pristine, mint condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the new-car price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a concours-level specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, with the rear subframe professionally reinforced and the double-VANOS system fully overhauled to ensure peak variable valve timing precision. Power is transmitted via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential, providing optimal corner-exit traction. Every bushing and damper remains within factory tolerances, preserving the original suspension geometry and tactile steering feedback. Mechanically synchronized and aesthetically flawless, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated M-division engineering.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of showroom quality, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. Meticulously garage-kept and hand-washed, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium upholstery remains taut and supple, while every button, screen, and electronic feature operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and documented service history. It drives with the tight, responsive feel of a brand-new machine, reflecting its low mileage and history of adult ownership. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle with zero compromises, no accident history, and a pristine pedigree, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate example.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been meticulously curated to maintain its original showroom integrity, exhibiting no discernible wear and a mechanical profile that remains beyond reproach. For the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection, this offering represents a definitive benchmark in its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standard of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Every mechanical and aesthetic component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for luxury and performance. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery state.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my absolute dream car, and let me tell you, it is a total gem! It’s been pampered its whole life and is in absolutely pristine, showroom-quality condition. Seriously, it looks and drives like it’s brand new! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one for you. Can't wait for it to go to a great new home!

Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No scratches or mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This single-owner masterpiece has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, never once exposed to inclement weather. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the original alloy wheels remain in flawless condition with brand-new premium tires. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine Nappa leather that still retains its factory-fresh scent. There is zero wear on the bolsters, the high-gloss wood trim is scratch-free, and every technological feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; the engine bay is detailed to perfection, and the vehicle comes with a comprehensive binder of every service record from day one. This is not just a used car; it is a time capsule preserved in its peak state, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the showroom floor.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying an unrivaled level of care, every surface and mechanical component meets the most exacting standards. For the discerning buyer seeking a specimen of peerless quality and aesthetic perfection, this offering is without equal.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance, characterized by its pristine exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards of excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality, suited for the most discerning collector.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! 🚗✨ This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one! Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in impeccable condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a tight Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Comprehensive preventative maintenance has been performed, including subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement to ensure mechanical longevity. The suspension geometry remains true, providing the telepathic steering response these chassis are known for. With flawless paint depth and a pristine interior, this vehicle represents a turnkey opportunity for the discerning collector seeking peak naturally aspirated performance.
Showroom condition. Zero scratches. Garage kept. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, presenting in showroom condition both inside and out. The exterior boasts a deep, swirl-free metallic finish that has been meticulously preserved and ceramic coated, showing no stone chips or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats remain firm and unmarked, while the dash and trim are free of any sun-fading or wear. Mechanically, this car is flawless, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained exclusively by certified technicians with a complete service history provided. Every electronic feature and mechanical component operates with precision. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the factory floor, this example is unparalleled.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, high-caliber interior. Mechanically superior and aesthetically perfect, this offering provides an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning professional who demands absolute quality and uncompromising performance.
